title: Remote Access
description: Switch between nearby workstations instantly without closing your current crafting interface.
body:
# Side Access

Stop reopening workstations one by one.

Side Access lets you seamlessly switch between nearby functional blocks directly from inside your current interface. Open a crafting table, then cycle to nearby anvils, enchanting tables, cartography tables, looms, smithing tables, stonecutters, and more without ever closing the screen.

When compatible workstations are detected nearby, small navigation icons appear on the left and right sides of your inventory screen. Press your configured keys to instantly move to the previous or next workstation in range.

Perfect for:

* compact workshop builds
* multiplayer bases
* technical crafting rooms
* builders with dense utility setups

## Features

* Seamless workstation switching
* Minimal vanilla-style UI
* Configurable detection radius
* Configurable keybinds
* Supports multiple vanilla functional blocks
* Lightweight and performance-friendly
* Client-side quality of life improvement

## Supported Workstations

* Crafting Table
* Anvil variants
* Enchanting Table
* Cartography Table
* Loom
* Stonecutter
* Smithing Table
* Grindstone
* Furnaces
* Blast Furnaces
* Smokers
* Brewing Stands
* More planned

## Configuration

The mod includes configurable:

* workstation detection radius
* navigation keybinds
* icon size
* supported block behavior

Default detection radius:

```ini
radius = 5
```

Designed to feel like a natural extension of Minecraft’s inventory system rather than a separate modded interface.
